No. 673/11/2010-Cus.VIII, dated 30-8-2010 under the said sub-section directing that Shri Mohibur Rahaman, Village : Babupur (Birnagar), P.O. Palgachi, P.S. : Baisnabnagar, Dist. : Malada, West Bengal, be detained and kept in custody in the Presidency Correctional Home, Kolkata with a view to preventing him from engaging in transporting, concealing and keeping the smuggled goods in future. Whereas the Central Government has reasons to believe that the aforesaid person has absconded or has been concealing himself so that the order cannot be executed. Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by Clause (b) of sub-section (1) of Section 7 of the said Act, the Central Government hereby directs the aforesaid person to appear before the Director General of Police, Government of West Bengal, Kolkata within 7 days of the publication of this order in the Official Gazette. [F. No. 673/11/2010-Cus.VIII] RASHEDA HUSSAIN, Jt. Secy.
